articles.title: Govt Bars Bulk Industrial Petrol, Diesel Purchases Through Petrol Pumps
articles.description: The government has implemented a temporary ban on industrial, commercial, and institutional users from purchasing petrol and diesel at retail outlets, mandating these consumers to obtain fuel from bulk sale points instead., India News, Times Now

articles.title: Stock market today: Gift Nifty hints gap-up start; US-Iran peace deal to global markets rally - 7 stocks to buy
articles.description: Indian markets may open positively on June 12, 2026, following a strong rally in global equities amid optimism for a US-Iran peace deal. Oil prices dropped as tensions eased, while Asian markets showed resilience, marking a rebound in investor confidence.
